finding_results.notes: Reworked the cited emphasis clusters so they resolve through complete sentences, physical detail, and action rather than repeated clipped ladders. summary: Chapter 3 now carries its major emotional landings with more rhythmic variance while preserving the chapter spine, continuity, and unsanitized pressure.
